lists.title: Names That Mean Ocean
lists.seoTitle: Ocean & Sea Baby Names - Meanings & Origins | Namylab
lists.seoDescription: Discover baby names meaning ocean, sea, or water. Find the perfect oceanic name with meanings, origins, and popularity.
lists.customIntro: Names that mean ocean capture the vast beauty and mysterious power of the sea, offering choices that evoke waves, depths, and endless horizons. These names connect with parents who feel drawn to water's calming presence or who have special connections to coastal life. Ocean-inspired names work across cultures, appearing in traditions from Hawaiian to Greek, each bringing their own interpretation of the sea's significance. Ocean names range from obvious choices directly meaning sea or water to subtle options referencing marine life, tides, or nautical themes. Many feature flowing sounds that mirror water's movement, creating names that feel fluid and natural. When selecting an ocean name, consider whether you prefer direct meanings or softer references to maritime elements. The sea gives endless inspiration for meaningful naming. Our curated list includes 28 baby names meaning ocean, sea, or water from cultures around the world. Each name includes its origin, meaning, and connection to aquatic themes. Think about your personal relationship with the ocean and what aspects of water inspire you most. An ocean name gives your child a lifelong connection to one of nature's most strong and beautiful elements.
